g.text: FS-V1 PHYSICAL DISK LAYOUT MAP (4KB BLOCK ALIGNMENT)

ul.li: I/O Alignment: All disk transactions MUST be 4KB aligned.
Endianness: Little-Endian (Intel Standard) for all multi-byte fields.
Journaling: WAL uses Physical LBA Circular Buffer.
Checksums: Metadata blocks (Superblock/Inodes) use CRC32C at trailing 4-bytes.
Concurrency: O_DIRECT recommended for raw block access to prevent double-buffering.

div.p: Data Start LBA: 1 + N + M + K + J
